'''Thanos''' was the white-blue primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Thanos system|Togoria system]].<ref name="GG4" /><ref name="TCSWE" /> It was orbited by two inhabited worlds, [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]] and [[Thanos]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
